title: We Do Copyright
body:
Add your announcement before titlescreen.

Support a ResourceLoaction for a picture.  
Support a list of Component for texts.

![Photosensitive Epilepsy Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ab5a6e7bfc064ecad01f3ef4639004a9a564bf_0.webp)

![Copyright Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc0558efe20c36cd867ad177637aa655d1f7d55c_0.webp)

![All mods logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4184fbbcc8f37d13b281012d053c541e37ef81b0.png)

Only allow modpack origin authors to redistribute the mod.
